name: Horseradish Cheese Spread
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Processed cheese, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the cheese in the top of a double boiler or microwave.
2. Stir in mayonnaise and horseradish until combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a small crock or ceramic bowl.
4. Chill thoroughly.
5. Serve with assorted crackers.
Makes about 2-1/2 cups.
